basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 2 Project Associate I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent qualification, B.Sc./B.C.A or equivalent with at least 4 years of post-qualification experience, Minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Project Associate I: M.Sc./B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent qualification OR B.Sc./B.C.A or equivalent with at least 4 years of post-qualification experience. Candidates should have a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

salary_details.details: Rs 45,000 to 70,000 per month, depending on the qualification and experience of the candidate.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 1 positions is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate 1 post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Associate 1 position at IIT Gandhinagar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate 1 role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc./B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent qualification, or a B.Sc./B.C.A or equivalent with at least 4 years of post-qualification experience. A minimum of 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate 1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate 1 post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000, based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 1 jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 1 recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions advertised are on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat. Candidates applying should be willing to work at the IIT Gandhinagar campus.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate 1 role?
faq.answer: The official notification does not detail the specific selection process. Candidates are advised to refer to the official PDF for comprehensive information on how they will be evaluated.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from other states.
